inputs.text:
A beautiful Indonesian Muslim bride wearing an elegant hijab wedding dress with coquette princess vibes. The dress features voluminous balloon sleeves made of translucent organza fabric, creating a soft and airy silhouette. The bodice showcases delicate floral embroidery with mini roses scattered across the surface. The skirt is A-line and flowy, crafted from layered tulle that is light enough to sit comfortably but still maintains volume. At the lower portion of the skirt, 3D asymmetric floral appliqués in satin fabric add texture and dimension.

The color palette is a stunning gradient transitioning from soft strawberry pink at the top bodice down through the waistline into soft matcha green at the bottom hem, creating a unique strawberry-matcha fusion look. A thin satin sash cinches the waist elegantly, accentuating the bride's figure.

The bride wears a hijab made of satin chiffon in matching soft pink, styled beautifully to complement the dress. The neckline is V-shaped with a sheer overlay adding delicacy to the upper chest area.

The dress is floor-length with a light court train trailing gently behind. Soft romantic lighting bathes the scene in warm pastel tones. The overall aesthetic is high-end fashion photography style with realistic photo quality, capturing every detail of the fabric textures and floral elements. The bride stands gracefully against a soft neutral background that allows the dress colors to shine.
